name: Suspicious EventLog Cleared
notes: This rule detects clearing of eventlogs using wevtutil, powershell and wmic.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via PowerShell
BB:MITREDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via WMIC
BB:MITREDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via Wevtutil
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via PowerShell, BB:MITREDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via Wevtutil, BB:MITREDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via WMIC
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious EventLog Cleared on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via PowerShell, BB:MITREDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via Wevtutil, BB:MITREDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via WMIC
RED_list: Event description: Detects clearing of eventlogs using wevtutil, powershell and wmic.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
